summary: Joe Reis announces his new solo podcast, The Joe Reis Show, as a companion to his existing Monday Morning Data Chat podcast. He positions it as a space for candid, unfiltered commentary on the technology and data industry.
key_points: Launching a solo podcast for more frequent, candid industry commentary
Existing podcast (Monday Morning Data Chat) is fully booked months out
Focus will be on honest takes about the technology and data industry
money_quotes: I'd like a place to rant on a regular basis, either screaming at the sky or rambling with my friends.
I'll be giving very candid takes on the technology and data industry. Lord knows we need it.
key_insight: The data industry needs more candid, unfiltered commentary rather than the polished narratives that typically dominate industry discourse.
